g.text: OT computed in PC-20; PHATE only for visualization. Endpoint arrows are model-implied, not observed lineage. Sinkhorn OT at ε=0.05 reduces expected PC-20 transport cost from 299.6 to 161.4; smaller ε did not converge here.
